title: PayPal button color is orange-yellow (warning token), not PayPal yellow
body: The PayPal button uses bg-warning/text-warning-foreground which is hsl(38, 92%, 50%) = orange-yellow. True PayPal yellow is #FFC439. Could add a --paypal CSS variable and bg-paypal token to globals.css and tailwind.config.mjs for accurate brand colors.
rationale: Design system accuracy — current choice is visually distinct but not on-brand
